description: Composite Balancer pool risk gate thresholds

max_token_weight_pct.description: Maximum allowed concentration of any single token in the pool, as a percentage 0-100. Set to 80 to allow 80/20 weighted pools.

deny_on_underlying_risk.description: Whether to deny when the pool contains boosted/wrapped tokens with nested pools or underlying yield-bearing assets.

min_tvl_usd.description: Minimum acceptable pool TVL in USD. Pools below this floor are denied.

tvl_drawdown_24h_max_pct.description: Maximum allowed 24h TVL drawdown percentage. Null oracle values fail-soft and do not trigger this rule.

tvl_drawdown_7d_max_pct.description: Maximum allowed 7d TVL drawdown percentage. Null oracle values fail-soft and do not trigger this rule.
